display-lg.purpose: Page-level titles: report headline, landing hero. Ceiling 2.5rem.

section-title.purpose: Workhorse heading: panel titles, card titles, current question framing.

body-lg.purpose: Primary reading text: question, transcript answers, report prose. 65-75ch.

label-caps.purpose: Uppercase metadata and speaker labels, chip and badge text.

mono-label.purpose: Machine-generated content only: IDs, timestamps, technical references.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: The No-Shadow Rule. Depth is tonal layering + 1px hairlines, never a cast shadow.

motion.name: ease-cockpit
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for state, route, and reveal transitions. ~0.4-0.5s.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Standard transition duration for entrances and state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single strongest action on a screen. Deep teal fill, brightens on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-primary-container, #0d9488); color: var(--color-on-primary, #04211c); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-primary, #2dd4bf); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-surface, #0e1116), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-primary, #2dd4bf); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Bordered, low-emphasis alternative to the primary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-outline-variant, #2a313c); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-surface-container-lowest, #161b22); color: var(--color-on-surface, #e6edf3); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--color-surface-container-low, #1b222b); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-surface, #0e1116), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-primary, #2dd4bf); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard field. Border shifts to teal with a soft ring on focus.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Paste your target role…" />
components.css: .ds-input { height: 40px; width: 260px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-outline-variant, #2a313c); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-surface-container-lowest, #161b22); color: var(--color-on-surface, #e6edf3); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-on-surface-variant, #9aa4b2) 60%, transparent); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-primary, #2dd4bf); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #2dd4bf) 20%, transparent); }

components.name: Evidence Chip
components.description: Amber tag for transcript evidence and resume snippets. Amber only — never teal or red.
components.css: .ds-evidence-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-evidence, #e7b24a) 15%, transparent); color: var(--color-on-evidence, #f5c77a); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Status Badge (Missing)
components.description: Status pill with a mandatory leading icon so status is never color-only. Verified/Missing/Incomplete/Warning variants.
components.html: Missing
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-error, #f0635e) 15%, transparent); color: var(--color-on-error-container, #fca5a0); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Claim Card
components.description: Resume project claim card with a 4px left status accent (teal = verified, amber = hypothesis) plus a full hairline border.
components.html:
Real-time sync engine

Reduced p95 latency — baseline and measurement method not yet stated.
components.css: .ds-claim-card { max-width: 340px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-outline-variant, #2a313c); border-left: 4px solid var(--color-evidence, #e7b24a); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-surface-container-lowest, #161b22); } .ds-claim-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-on-surface, #e6edf3); } .ds-claim-body { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.5rem; color: var(--color-on-surface-variant, #9aa4b2); }

components.name: Transcript Row (Active)
components.description: A single turn in the transcript timeline. Active turn gets a wash + aria-current; upcoming is dimmed; state never relies on color alone.
components.html: InterviewerWhat was the baseline before your change, and what did you personally build?
components.css: .ds-transcript-row { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; max-width: 420px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-surface-container-low, #1b222b); } .ds-transcript-speaker { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-on-surface-variant, #9aa4b2); } .ds-transcript-text { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.5rem; color: var(--color-on-surface, #e6edf3); }

components.name: Nav Item (Active)
components.description: Sidebar nav row. Active = surface wash + semibold + teal icon/text; inactive = muted steel resolving to readout white on hover.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 220px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; text-decoration: none; color: var(--color-on-surface-variant, #9aa4b2); transition: background 200ms, color 200ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: var(--color-surface-container-low, #1b222b); color: var(--color-on-surface, #e6edf3); } .ds-nav-active { background: var(--color-surface-container-low, #1b222b); font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-primary, #2dd4bf); }

narrative.overview: Companion is an instrument panel in a darkened cabin. The candidate is flying the interview; surfaces recede into near-black so the readouts, the live question, and the single electric-teal glow of what's active carry the whole cabin. Depth comes from tonal layering and 1px hairlines, never shadows. Density is high and IDE-like. Color is strictly semantic and rationed: teal = action/live, amber = evidence, red = challenge/gap, green = success. It never reads as a hiring verdict, a playful study app, a chatbot thread, or magical-AI spectacle.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black canvas (#0e1116) with panels layered up in tonal steps, not shadows.
One vivid accent — electric teal — reserved for action and the live/active state.
1px hairline borders (#2a313c) separate panels; depth is tonal, not lifted.
Three semantic status colors (amber / red / green), each paired with a non-color signal.
Precise, dense, workspace-grade layout capped at 1440px on an 8px rhythm.
Typography splits work: IBM Plex Sans structures, Inter reads, IBM Plex Mono for IDs/metadata.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Electric teal is the only action/live color. It appears on ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity is what makes 'active' instantly readable.

rules.name: The Semantic-Color Rule
rules.body: Teal = action/live, amber = evidence, red = challenge/gap, green = success. A color is never chosen for decoration or variety.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black, No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: The canvas is #0e1116, not #000; text is #e6edf3, not #fff. Softened contrast keeps long dark sessions calm.

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Machine Rule
rules.body: IBM Plex Mono is reserved for machine-generated content. Human prose is never set in mono; the typeface signals who is speaking.

rules.name: The Display-Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Display Large tops out at 2.5rem/40px. This is an instrument panel, not a marketing hero.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Drop shadows and glassmorphism are forbidden. Raised surfaces step up the graphite ramp with a hairline border.

rules.name: The Focus-Is-Teal Rule
rules.body: Selection and focus are shown by a 2px teal border/ring, not by growing, shadowing, or scaling.

dos: Do keep electric teal (#2dd4bf) rare — one live/active signal per view, ≤10% of the surface.
Do convey depth with tonal steps on the graphite ramp (#161b22 → #2b333f) plus 1px outline-variant (#2a313c) borders.
Do pair every status with a non-color signal — an icon, label, or shape.
Do use IBM Plex Mono only for machine output; set all human prose in Inter.
Do show focus and selection with a 2px teal border/ring on a surface offset.
Do keep the interview room a three-pane workspace partitioned by borders.
Do keep body text at Readout White (#e6edf3) on Cabin Black; bump toward ink before lightening it.
donts: Don't ship a generic SaaS dashboard — no identical icon-heading-text card grids, hero-metric tiles, or gradient-and-glow chrome.
Don't make it a playful edtech app — no mascots, confetti, streaks, badges, or bubbly friendliness.
Don't turn the interview room into a chatbot thread — a centered message list with a text box is the wrong mental model.
Don't use magical-AI spectacle — no sparkles, glowing orbs, animated avatars, or exposed chain-of-thought.
Don't use drop shadows or glassmorphism for elevation; step the tonal ramp instead.
Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff).
Don't use color as decoration; every hue must resolve to action, evidence, challenge, or success.
Don't add a bare colored side-stripe as an accent; the only sanctioned left bar is the Claim Card status accent, always paired with a full border.
Don't present any element as a hiring verdict, pass/fail, or employability score.
